component.name: FinzyTrack
component.summary: Privacy-focused personal finance on a plain-text ledger

description.p: FinzyTrack is open-source personal finance software for people who want to understand their finances without giving up privacy or control. It is built on Beancount double-entry bookkeeping, so all data lives in a plain-text ledger file on your machine — readable by any text editor, with no lock-in.

Features include rule-based imports for OFX, CSV, XLS, PDF, and email statements; customizable dashboards with KPI cards, charts, and pivot tables; full-history search with advanced filtering; SQL and BQL querying; and optional AI assistance that works with any model you choose.
